title: kunzea micrantha subsp. oligandra
intro: Kunzea micrantha subsp. oligandra, also known as Tasmanian Kunzea or Small-leaved White Kunzea, is a shrubby plant native to Tasmania and southeastern Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The leaves of Kunzea micrantha subsp. oligandra have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, cuts, and skin irritations, due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Kunzea micrantha subsp. oligandra can be found in various forms, including teas, salves, and ointments, and are often used to promote wound healing and soothe skin conditions.
